zvt0am7zyhsx__8845bfc37bb2f69e8f200fe281.text: Cardano Curia votes YES and considers this Info Action constitutional under Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__c21b00f90f18fce4003edf42b0.text: Cardano Curia finds this parameter update constitutional under Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__91a79f5c934b7c91e3027736d5.text: Cardano Curia judges this governance action constitutional and supports adoption of the Cardano Blockchain Ecosystem Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__f8393f1ff814d3d52336a97712.text: This Treasury Withdrawal is constitutional under Articles III and IV of the Cardano Constitution. It defines a valid treasury purpose, establishes administrators, oversight, audits, and provisions for the return of unused funds. While its scale and necessary confidentiality reduce upfront transparency and increase governance risk, these factors do not constitute a constitutional violation.

zvt0am7zyhsx__8f54d021c6e6fcdd5a4908f10a.text: This Budget Info Action is constitutional under Article III of the Cardano Constitution. It provides non-binding but constitutionally relevant guidance on intended treasury allocations, scope, and governance expectations, without authorizing any treasury withdrawal.

zvt0am7zyhsx__d16dffbae9d86a73cb343506e6.text: This governance action is constitutional and supports continuity of treasury operations.

zwz2a08a8cqd__207b226e110e13bb18b119fcd3.text: The ECC has reviewed this governance action proposing a new version of the Cardano Constitution. While we recognize that the proposal satisfies the formal procedural requirements as defined in the current Constitution, we find that there are significant process-related concerns regarding participatory legitimacy. In light of these tensions—between technical compliance and normative expectations—we have opted to abstain from casting a constitutional determination.

zwt49epsdedw__4b10e5793208cb8f228756e021.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano DeFi Liquidity Budget - Withdrawal 1” Treasury Withdrawals Governance Action unconstitutional under Article II.6.1.

zwt49epsdedw__8845bfc37bb2f69e8f200fe281.text: Ace Alliance finds the Info Action "Name Protocol Version 11 hard fork - van Rossem" Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__dc4c679c8cf1cec49817d4d2c1.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Net Change Limit (Epoch 613 to Epoch 713)” Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__c21b00f90f18fce4003edf42b0.text: Ace Alliance finds the Parameter Update Governance Action “Increase Transaction and Block Memory Units (Part 1 of 2)” Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__a633504ddc47a852c4ae033c75.text: Ace Alliance finds this Action **Constitutional**. It proactively establishes a spending framework compliant with Article II(7) standards for Treasury Withdrawals, even though "Budget" actions are not explicitly mandated by the current Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__91a79f5c934b7c91e3027736d5.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano Blockchain Ecosystem Constitution v2.4” New Constitution Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__f8393f1ff814d3d52336a97712.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Withdraw ₳70,000,000 for Cardano Critical Integrations Budget” Treasury Withdrawal Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__3a5be93bafd26d0dbb9bfe19f4.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano 2030: Vision, Mission, Strategy Framework and KPIs” Info Action Constitutional. We assess the constitutionality of the Action, not the merits of referenced materials

zwt49epsdedw__d16dffbae9d86a73cb343506e6.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed "2025 Net Change Limit Extension" Info Action Constitutional, subject to meeting the required DRep voting threshold of \>50% of the active voting stake when the Action expires at epoch boundary 603-604.

zwt49epsdedw__8f54d021c6e6fcdd5a4908f10a.text: We find the “Cardano Critical Integrations Budget” Info Action Unconstitutional while the CC size is below committeeMinSize parameter. This condition may be remedied before voting ends at the end of Epoch 603.

zwt49epsdedw__a36eafaea085b77f97cceacf07.text: The Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Securing Generic Top-Level Domains for the Cardano Ecosystem” Info Action Constitutional. We comment only on its constitutionality, not the merits of the initiative itself, in line with Article VII, Section 4 of the Cardano Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__3285b7fd0da16d21e0b8f8910c.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Reimburse Ikigai Info Governance Action Deposit.” Governance Action **Constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__03f671791fd97011f30e4d6b76.text: We abstain on the “Loan ₳5,000,000 to Expand Cardano’s Global Listings” TWGA because of direct involvement in shaping the off-chain loan contract between Snek Foundation and Intersect.

zwt49epsdedw__d2745225498d1c56c0f01be997.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed "Constitutional Committee Compensation Epochs 581-653" Governance Action constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__c882f194684d672316212f01ef.text: Ace Alliance finds the Cardano Constitution v2.3 proposal to be **constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__d2db60c5307cb517c735e2d013.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Withdraw ₳1,150,000 for GovTool 12 months active maintenance and development” Governance Action **Constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__996edfe370b8e51be73541e754.text: The Ace Alliance finds this Info Action constitutional. We comment only on its constitutionality, not merits of referenced materials, in line with Article VII, Section 4 of the Cardano Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__e5643c33f608642e329228a968.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Stablecoin DeFi Liquidity Budget” Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__90cf51975f9c19c291bac3e573.text: The proposed "Budget: ₳5M Loan for Cardano's Global Listing Expansion \- Powered by Snek" Info Action is **Constitutional**. The action follows procedural requirements for governance actions and establishes a compliant budget framework.

zwt49epsdedw__89e3a4f09122d669d6f6c82dd8.text: The proposed "Cardano in Oceania" Info Action is Constitutional. The action adheres to procedural requirements for governance actions and correctly establishes a framework for a budget that is compliant with the constitutional requirements.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__4b10e5793208cb8f228756e021.text: Unfortunate timing for this proposal which arrives alongside a constitutional change. Few misalignments mostly due to this.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__a633504ddc47a852c4ae033c75.text: Solid budget, albeit confusing in terms of deliveries.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__d16dffbae9d86a73cb343506e6.text: The propose info action qualifies as a Net-Change Limit (NCL) extension and rightfully extends the previously established "2025 NCL" of 350M ADA by 8 epochs (thus ending at the end of Epoch 612).

ztwq6mh5jkgw__a36eafaea085b77f97cceacf07.text: Abstaining for it isn't of constitutional matter.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__c882f194684d672316212f01ef.text: Abstaining due to lack of bandwidth.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__996edfe370b8e51be73541e754.text: The document is too ambiguous in its intent. It is half-way between a constitution and a budget proposal. Yet it is neither. Approving this document could help it being later weaponized to justify budgets and/or actions that do not go through due diligence.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__e5643c33f608642e329228a968.text: LGTM 👍, despite a single signer and mention of various other groups (the committee, the Amaru team, ...) who signature on the proposal are somewhat necessary IMO.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__90cf51975f9c19c291bac3e573.text: 👍 Ok, while slightly deceptive in some claims, the proposal is clear in its intent and abide by the rules pertaining to budget proposals.

zwz2a08a8cqd__gov_action1ypajyms3pcfmkx9.text: The ECC has reviewed this governance action proposing a new version of the Cardano Constitution. While we recognize that the proposal satisfies the formal procedural requirements as defined in the current Constitution, we find that there are significant process-related concerns regarding participatory legitimacy. In light of these tensions—between technical compliance and normative expectations—we have opted to abstain from casting a constitutional determination.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1fvgw27fjpr9c7g5.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano DeFi Liquidity Budget - Withdrawal 1” Treasury Withdrawals Governance Action unconstitutional under Article II.6.1.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action13pzmlsmmktmfare.text: Ace Alliance finds the Info Action "Name Protocol Version 11 hard fork - van Rossem" Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1m3xx08yv788vfxq.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Net Change Limit (Epoch 613 to Epoch 713)” Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1cgdsp7g0rr7wgqp.text: Ace Alliance finds the Parameter Update Governance Action “Increase Transaction and Block Memory Units (Part 1 of 2)” Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action15ce4qnwug759939.text: Ace Alliance finds this Action **Constitutional**. It proactively establishes a spending framework compliant with Article II(7) standards for Treasury Withdrawals, even though "Budget" actions are not explicitly mandated by the current Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1jxne7hynfd7frcc.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano Blockchain Ecosystem Constitution v2.4” New Constitution Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1lqun78lcznfa2ge.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Withdraw ₳70,000,000 for Cardano Critical Integrations Budget” Treasury Withdrawal Governance Action Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action18fd7jwa06fksmwu.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Cardano 2030: Vision, Mission, Strategy Framework and KPIs” Info Action Constitutional. We assess the constitutionality of the Action, not the merits of referenced materials

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action169kllwhfmp488je.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed "2025 Net Change Limit Extension" Info Action Constitutional, subject to meeting the required DRep voting threshold of \>50% of the active voting stake when the Action expires at epoch boundary 603-604.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action13a2dqgwxum7d6kj.text: We find the “Cardano Critical Integrations Budget” Info Action Unconstitutional while the CC size is below committeeMinSize parameter. This condition may be remedied before voting ends at the end of Epoch 603.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action15dh2lt4qskmhl97.text: The Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Securing Generic Top-Level Domains for the Cardano Ecosystem” Info Action Constitutional. We comment only on its constitutionality, not the merits of the initiative itself, in line with Article VII, Section 4 of the Cardano Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1x2zm0lgd59kjrc9.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Reimburse Ikigai Info Governance Action Deposit.” Governance Action **Constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1q0m8z7glm9cpruc.text: We abstain on the “Loan ₳5,000,000 to Expand Cardano’s Global Listings” TWGA because of direct involvement in shaping the off-chain loan contract between Snek Foundation and Intersect.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action16f69yf2f35w9ds8.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed "Constitutional Committee Compensation Epochs 581-653" Governance Action constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1ezp0r9rgf4njx93.text: Ace Alliance finds the Cardano Constitution v2.3 proposal to be **constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action16tdkp3fs0j6303e.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Withdraw ₳1,150,000 for GovTool 12 months active maintenance and development” Governance Action **Constitutional**.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1n9hdlcmshrj3hee.text: The Ace Alliance finds this Info Action constitutional. We comment only on its constitutionality, not merits of referenced materials, in line with Article VII, Section 4 of the Cardano Constitution.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1u4jrcvlkppjzuv5.text: Ace Alliance finds the proposed “Stablecoin DeFi Liquidity Budget” Constitutional.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action1jr84r96lnsvu9yd.text: The proposed "Budget: ₳5M Loan for Cardano's Global Listing Expansion \- Powered by Snek" Info Action is **Constitutional**. The action follows procedural requirements for governance actions and establishes a compliant budget framework.

zwt49epsdedw__gov_action13836fuy3yttxn4h.text: The proposed "Cardano in Oceania" Info Action is Constitutional. The action adheres to procedural requirements for governance actions and correctly establishes a framework for a budget that is compliant with the constitutional requirements.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action19uhuy5uame2s60y.text: Conflict of interest: I am one of the proposers.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action1fvgw27fjpr9c7g5.text: Unfortunate timing for this proposal which arrives alongside a constitutional change. Few misalignments mostly due to this.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action15ce4qnwug759939.text: Solid budget, albeit confusing in terms of deliveries.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action169kllwhfmp488je.text: The propose info action qualifies as a Net-Change Limit (NCL) extension and rightfully extends the previously established "2025 NCL" of 350M ADA by 8 epochs (thus ending at the end of Epoch 612).

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action15dh2lt4qskmhl97.text: Abstaining for it isn't of constitutional matter.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action1ezp0r9rgf4njx93.text: Abstaining due to lack of bandwidth.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action1n9hdlcmshrj3hee.text: The document is too ambiguous in its intent. It is half-way between a constitution and a budget proposal. Yet it is neither. Approving this document could help it being later weaponized to justify budgets and/or actions that do not go through due diligence.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action1u4jrcvlkppjzuv5.text: LGTM 👍, despite a single signer and mention of various other groups (the committee, the Amaru team, ...) who signature on the proposal are somewhat necessary IMO.

ztwq6mh5jkgw__gov_action1jr84r96lnsvu9yd.text: 👍 Ok, while slightly deceptive in some claims, the proposal is clear in its intent and abide by the rules pertaining to budget proposals.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action19uhuy5uame2s60y.text: The Constitutional Committee finds the Amaru 2026 Treasury Withdrawal constitutional, subject to final submission meeting immutability and auditability requirements.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action13pzmlsmmktmfare.text: Cardano Curia votes YES and considers this Info Action constitutional under Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action1cgdsp7g0rr7wgqp.text: Cardano Curia finds this parameter update constitutional under Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action1jxne7hynfd7frcc.text: Cardano Curia judges this governance action constitutional and supports adoption of the Cardano Blockchain Ecosystem Constitution v2.4.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action1lqun78lcznfa2ge.text: This Treasury Withdrawal is constitutional under Articles III and IV of the Cardano Constitution. It defines a valid treasury purpose, establishes administrators, oversight, audits, and provisions for the return of unused funds. While its scale and necessary confidentiality reduce upfront transparency and increase governance risk, these factors do not constitute a constitutional violation.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action13a2dqgwxum7d6kj.text: This Budget Info Action is constitutional under Article III of the Cardano Constitution. It provides non-binding but constitutionally relevant guidance on intended treasury allocations, scope, and governance expectations, without authorizing any treasury withdrawal.

zvt0am7zyhsx__gov_action169kllwhfmp488je.text: This governance action is constitutional and supports continuity of treasury operations.

zvt0am7zyhsx__2f2fc2539dde550d3c83bea67c.text: The Constitutional Committee finds the Amaru 2026 Treasury Withdrawal constitutional, subject to final submission meeting immutability and auditability requirements.
